request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. When I was in charge of emergency drills in my hometown, we had to cut corners due to budget constraints. It's not just about money—it's about ensuring our communities are ready when disaster strikes. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurity
